creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Build is broken with new ruby and db 4.6 from ports.  The first (but probably not the only) problem is that ruby 1.9, unlike ruby 1.8, has no

%%RUBY_LIBDIR%%/%%RUBY_ARCH%%/version.h

Transcript:
